nasb.text: For behold, the Lord is about to come out from His place To punish the inhabitants of the earth for their iniquity; And the earth will reveal her bloodshed And will no longer cover her slain.

esv.text: For behold, the Lord is coming out from his place to punish the inhabitants of the earth for their iniquity, and the earth will disclose the blood shed on it, and will no more cover its slain.

cnv.text: 因為你看！耶和華從他的居所出來， 要懲罰地上居民的罪孽； 大地要露出其上所流的血， 不再遮蓋被殺的人。”

ccb.text: 看啊，耶和华要走出祂的居所， 惩罚世上犯罪的人。 大地必不再隐藏被杀之人的尸首， 必将所流的血显露出来。

csbs.text: 看哪！耶和华就要从自己的地方出来， 惩罚地上居民的罪孽； 地必显露其中的血， 不再遮盖被杀的人。
